deadline_notes: Biennial ending July 31 of odd years. Period: August 1, 2025 – July 31, 2027.
notes: 8hr A&A applies to ALL licensees (hard rule). 10hr carryover (not for A&A/ethics). Combined self-study+instructor+articles cap: 64hr (80%). Nano learning in fractional increments. $220 renewal fee. ~1,500-2,500 VT CPAs.
